targets.query: from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iec104") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "iec104-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "${action_iec104}")

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iec104") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "iec104-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "${action_iec104}")

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iec104") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "breaker_state") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "iec104-server") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "dnp3") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tank_level") |> last() |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "dnp3-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "${action_dnp3}")

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "dnp3") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "flow_rate") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "dnp3-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "${action_dnp3}")

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "dnp3") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pump_state") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "dnp3-server") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "register_value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "modbus-server" or r.container == "modbus-attacker") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "${action_modbus}")

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "register_value") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "modbus-server" or r.container == "modbus-attacker") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "${action_modbus}") |> group() |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "wind_speed") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "opcua-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "read")

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "wind_speed") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "opcua-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "read") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "setpoint") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "opcua-attacker") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "write") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "setpoint") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "opcua-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "write") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: -5m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "setpoint") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "opcua-server") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.action == "write") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "modbus-attacker") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "iec104") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "iec104-attacker") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "dnp3") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "dnp3-attacker") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "opcua") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latency") |> filter(fn: (r) => r.container == "opcua-attacker") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ids_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_alerts") |> last()
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ids_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "modbus_alerts") |> last()
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ids_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "iec104_alerts") |> last()
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ids_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "dnp3_alerts") |> last()
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ids_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "opcua_alerts") |> last()
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ids_alert") |> group(columns: ["protocol"]) |> count() |> group()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_action") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "blocked") |> group(columns: ["protocol"]) |> count() |> group()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "block_rate") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_blocked") |> last()
from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mttd_ms") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_attempts") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: -10m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "blocked") |> group(columns: ["protocol"]) |> last() |> group() |> keep(columns: ["protocol", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "blocked_count"})

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "block_rate") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "false_positive_rate") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_whitelist_pass_count") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "firewall_stats") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "total_blacklisted_ips") |> last()

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qos_metrics") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "priority_1_latency_ms") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qos_metrics") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "priority_2_latency_ms") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "scada-metrics") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "qos_class") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "packets") |> group(columns: ["priority"]) |> last() |> group() |> keep(columns: ["priority", "_value"]) |> rename(columns: {_value: "packets"})

from(bucket: "scada-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "qos_drop")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "drop_rate")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
